series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Lottery Game Show Raw Feed Digital Files
series_metadata.series_description: 1) Digital video copies of actual Ohio Lottery Game Shows, which airs on TV. The digital copy reflects how the Show is actually viewed by the public in its regularly scheduled time slot on TV. 2) Raw feed digital copy of activities related to the production and or the Ohio Lottery Game Show. The raw feed digital copy enables the public and the Ohio Lottery Commission to view activities, which take place before and during the taping of the Ohio Lottery Game Show. It is in unedited format and can be used to ascertain whether a problem arose during the taping of the Ohio Lottery Game Show.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain digital copy in system no longer of value. Prior deletion, check with State Archivist historical value, if none
